chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.256 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For orders on M.A. No.3908/2025 3. For hearing of main case ----------------------------------------------------- 16.05.2025 None present for applicant, no intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 20.03.2025. Continuous absence of applicant and his counsel shows that they have lost interest to pursue their case. Therefore, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
